segments.text: Sorry if I look a little lost, I just keep my head up in the clouds, yeah, yeah, yeah
Give it to her however she wants, Told her that she gotta keep it down though, yeah, yeah
I could do this shit like every night, Grab your friends and pull them to the side, yeah, yeah, yeah
Never been so busy in my life, Told me that she wouldn't do it twice now, yeah, yeah
Honestly she needs a little lovin', Fuckin' now I'm getting off the subject, yeah, yeah
Just think she needs a little something, Or someone to get into heavy talks with, yeah, yeah
Everybody's eating on the walls, I don't think they're ready for the full, yeah, yeah, yeah
Had a little, now she wanting more, Told her that I gotta make some calls, yeah, yeah, yeah
This is might be one hell of a night, yeah, yeah, yeah
Call with me, we got a good time, yeah, yeah, yeah
Everybody's eating on the walls, Fuck it, I might take a little more now, yeah, yeah
